name: Vita Coco Company, Inc.
business: The Vita Coco Company sells coconut water and other plant-based beverages under the Vita Coco brand, as well as Private Label coconut water and coconut oil. Its portfolio also includes PWR LIFT protein drink. The company distributes products primarily in North America, the United Kingdom, and Germany through club, food, drug, mass, convenience, e-commerce, and on-premise channels.
sellsTo: on-premise locations (corporate offices, fitness clubs, airports, educational institutions)

exposures.sentence: We are one of the largest brands globally in the coconut and other plant waters category, and a large supplier of Private Label coconut water.

Our products are distributed primarily through club, food, drug, mass, convenience, e-commerce and a variety of on-premise locations such as corporate offices, fitness clubs, airports, and educational institutions.

catalysts.event: Restart supply of Private Label coconut water for a lost region in early 2026
catalysts.sentence: However, this customer has requested to restart supply in early 2026 for one of those lost regions.

catalysts.event: Continue online sales of PWR LIFT in 2026 while redesigning approach to protein drink category
catalysts.sentence: In 2026, we will continue online sales of PWR LIFT while redesigning our approach to succeeding in the protein drink category.
